tasks.label: Konyak: Flutter Doctor macOS
tasks.command: nix develop -c zsh -lc 'sdk=$(./scripts/prepare_flutter_macos_sdk.zsh --print-sdk-path) && DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer PATH="/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:$sdk/bin:$PATH" xcrun --find xcodebuild && cd apps/konyak && DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer PATH="/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:$sdk/bin:$PATH" "$sdk/bin/flutter" doctor -v'

tasks.label: Konyak: Flutter Pub Get
tasks.command: nix develop -c zsh -lc 'sdk=$(./scripts/prepare_flutter_macos_sdk.zsh --print-sdk-path) && cd apps/konyak && DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer PATH="/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:$sdk/bin:$PATH" "$sdk/bin/flutter" pub get'

tasks.label: Konyak: Flutter Run macOS (Nix Terminal)
tasks.command: nix develop -c zsh -lc 'sdk=$(./scripts/prepare_flutter_macos_sdk.zsh --print-sdk-path) && ./scripts/prepare_macos_dev_runtime_stack.zsh --print-manifest-path >/dev/null && repo=$PWD && runtime="$repo/.dart_tool/konyak/dev-runtime/macos-wine" && manifest="$repo/.dart_tool/konyak/dev-runtime-source/macos-wine-stack/konyak-macos-wine-runtime-stack-source.json" && prepare_script="$repo/scripts/prepare_macos_dev_runtime_stack.zsh" && cd apps/konyak && FLUTTER_ROOT="$sdk" KONYAK_REPO_ROOT="$repo" KONYAK_DART_EXECUTABLE="$sdk/bin/dart" KONYAK_CLI_SCRIPT="$repo/packages/konyak_cli/bin/konyak.dart" KONYAK_RUNTIME_PROFILE=development KONYAK_MACOS_WINE_HOME="$runtime" KONYAK_DEV_MACOS_WINE_STACK_MANIFEST="$manifest" KONYAK_MACOS_DEV_RUNTIME_PREPARE_SCRIPT="$prepare_script" DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer PATH="/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:$sdk/bin:$PATH" "$sdk/bin/flutter" run -d macos --dart-define=KONYAK_REPO_ROOT="$repo" --dart-define=KONYAK_DART_EXECUTABLE="$sdk/bin/dart" --dart-define=KONYAK_CLI_SCRIPT="$repo/packages/konyak_cli/bin/konyak.dart" --dart-define=KONYAK_RUNTIME_PROFILE=development --dart-define=KONYAK_MACOS_WINE_HOME="$runtime" --dart-define=KONYAK_DEV_MACOS_WINE_STACK_MANIFEST="$manifest" --dart-define=KONYAK_MACOS_DEV_RUNTIME_PREPARE_SCRIPT="$prepare_script"'

tasks.label: Konyak: Flutter Run Linux (.desktop Bundle)
tasks.command: nix develop -c zsh -lc 'cd apps/konyak && flutter build linux --debug && bundle_dir="$PWD/build/linux/x64/debug/bundle" && desktop_id="app.konyak.Konyak" && xdg_data_home="${XDG_DATA_HOME:-$HOME/.local/share}" && bundle_desktop_file="$bundle_dir/share/applications/$desktop_id.desktop" && executable="$bundle_dir/konyak" && icon_source="$bundle_dir/share/icons/hicolor/256x256/apps/$desktop_id.png" && desktop_target_dir="$xdg_data_home/applications" && icon_target_dir="$xdg_data_home/icons/hicolor/256x256/apps" && desktop_target_file="$desktop_target_dir/$desktop_id.desktop" && if [ ! -f "$bundle_desktop_file" ]; then echo "desktop file not found: $bundle_desktop_file" >&2; exit 1; fi && if [ ! -x "$executable" ]; then echo "bundle executable not found: $executable" >&2; exit 1; fi && if [ ! -f "$icon_source" ]; then echo "bundle icon not found: $icon_source" >&2; exit 1; fi && mkdir -p "$desktop_target_dir" "$icon_target_dir" && cp "$icon_source" "$icon_target_dir/$desktop_id.png" && sed "s|^Exec=.*$|Exec=$executable|" "$bundle_desktop_file" > "$desktop_target_file" && command -v update-desktop-database >/dev/null 2>&1 && update-desktop-database "$desktop_target_dir" || true && command -v gtk-update-icon-cache >/dev/null 2>&1 && gtk-update-icon-cache -f -t "$xdg_data_home/icons/hicolor" || true && before_pids=("${(@f)$(pgrep -f -- "$executable" || true)}") && XDG_DATA_HOME="$xdg_data_home" gtk-launch "$desktop_id" && app_pid="" && for _ in {1..50}; do after_pids=("${(@f)$(pgrep -f -- "$executable" || true)}") && for pid in "${after_pids[@]}"; do if [[ -n "$pid" ]] && (( ${before_pids[(Ie)$pid]} == 0 )); then app_pid="$pid"; break; fi; done; if [[ -n "$app_pid" ]]; then break; fi; sleep 0.2; done && if [[ -z "$app_pid" ]]; then echo "gtk-launch returned success, but no new Konyak process was detected." >&2; exit 1; fi && echo "Konyak launched via .desktop (pid $app_pid). Synced desktop entry: $desktop_target_file" && while kill -0 "$app_pid" 2>/dev/null; do sleep 1; done'
